symptom_vector: Pod crash or termination causing service unavailability with connection refusal errors

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [productcatalogservice] experienced [client_error, client_error_ratio, error, error_ratio] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [productcatalogservice] (From Ground Truth)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [Connection, refused] in [Log] (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [Error, while, dialing] in [Log] (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [timeout] in [Log] (From GT key_observations)
Step 5: Check Observation - Found keyword [unavailable] in [Log] (From GT key_observations)
Step 6: Check Observation - Found keyword [client_error, client_error_ratio, error, error_ratio] in [Metric] (From GT key_observations)
Step 7: Check Observation - Found keyword [pod_network_receive_bytes, pod_network_receive_packets, pod_network_transmit_bytes, pod_network_transmit_packets] in [Metric] (From GT key_observations)
Step 8: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [client_error, client_error_ratio, error, error_ratio] (From Ground Truth)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries show 'connection refused' errors when connecting to productcatalogservice on port 3550
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'connection refused' in logs related to productcatalogservice

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries contain 'transport: Error while dialing dial tcp 10.233.54.177:3550' error messages
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'Error while dialing' in logs

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Timeout-related errors in service connection attempts
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'timeout' in logs during fault period

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries show 'StatusCode.UNAVAILABLE' or 'unavailable' status codes
Metrics show error_ratio increased from 0.0 to 6.44 on productcatalogservice-2 and client_error_ratio increased from 0.0 to 6.44
critical_checks.instruction: Check metric values for error_ratio and client_error_ratio on productcatalogservice

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Network metrics show abnormal patterns indicating pod communication issues
critical_checks.instruction: Check pod network metrics for productcatalogservice pods
